entry.title: Undisclosed Desires
entry.summary:
Author: lmaosobsquietly

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,989Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Clark Kent has a habit of seeing the good in people. It’s what makes him a great reporter—and what makes Bruce Wayne a problem. Bruce doesn’t make sense. Not as a careless billionaire, not as the man Clark meets in quieter moments, and certainly not as the person Clark finds himself thinking about long after their conversations end. Bruce Wayne didn't plan on falling for a journalist with too many questions, and a smile that sees right through him. Bruce knows exactly why Clark is confused. He knows Clark is getting close to something he shouldn’t see, asking questions that don’t have safe answers. It’s a dangerous kind of attention—one Bruce should shut down immediately. Instead, he lets Clark in. Slowly. Carefully. Too much. As their connection deepens into something softer, something undeniable, the truth looms between them. Because Clark doesn’t know who Bruce really is. And Bruce is starting to realize he doesn’t want to keep pretending he doesn’t care.

entry.title: I Want to Know You
entry.summary:
Author: dueefbigfard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,915Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 15

Summary: Clark heard the static of Nightwing’s earpiece crackle to life as Oracle started talking. “There’s an attempted breaking and entering, half a mile south of you. Can you—” “On it.” Dick sprang to his feet and rolled his shoulders back, and suddenly Nightwing wasn’t just a story Clark had shared with a little boy all those years ago. “That’s my cue. See you around, Supes.” “Of course. Real quick, though,” Clark added, a little desperate. “If he’s not like…that, then what is Bruce actually like when he’s drunk?” “My friend,” Dick said, holding Clark by the shoulders in mock seriousness. “Perhaps one day you will know—but today is not that day.” “Right, of course, sure.” Bats and their secrets. “Be careful out there, buddy.” “Always am,” Dick said, lying through his teeth as he dropped ever so casually from the building.   5 times Clark thought Bruce was drunk, and one time he actually was

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,761Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: Must've Been The Wind
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 933Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 105

Summary: Off to the more quiet side of the scene—or as quiet as it could get—there's Batman and Superman. Batman's gaze is fixed solely on the holographic display projecting from his gauntlet and the contents of it's information. Presumably explaining said contents to Superman. Superman, who is looking at said contents from beside Batman, occasionally nodding in response to whatever he's saying. They're too far from whomever is taking this video for them to be heard, but one could get a good go at reading their lips. The most obvious thing said is by Superman, “Sorry, I didn't catch that," his lips betray, as he steps closer than he already is. Lowering his head and drawing his ear closer to Batman's mouth. >Anna @getannabortion [edited gif of Superman leaning in closer towards Batman—closer than he already is, captioned «Sorry, I didn't catch that»] he has super hearing 😐😐🥀          79k likes  142 replies >>Superman ✓     @officialsuperman REPLYING TO @getannabortion a man can't even shoot his shot anymore 💔💔          187k likes  401 replies >>>Anna      @getannabortion REPLYING TO @officialsuperman HELLOOO??? 😭😭💔💔💔             39k likes  97 replies

entry.title: sweet deal
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,480Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 143

Summary: By summoning a forgotten Kryptonian rite, Bruce Wayne ensures a peace treaty for Earth and its alien conquerors. All he has to do is join the harem of the House of El, and spend the rest of his days on a dangerous alien planet, but it’s not like anyone will miss him anyway.The only problem will be getting their stubborn Prince to cooperate.

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,173Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 146

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: like grey skies (like a bird of paradise)
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,336Chapters: 16/18Kudos: 504

Summary: He sighed to himself and downed the glass of champagne he'd been nursing—non-alcoholic, but enough to convince anyone who might give him a passing glance. He hated this, every time he had to do it. There was one surefire way to derail anyone who began wondering whether maybe Bruce Wayne was doing more than just donating funds to Batman. His tie hung loose around his neck, shirt unbuttoned to halfway down his chest, laughing too easily, pressing close to everyone he spoke to, whispering in ears, playing the part, until he turned and froze on the spot. Clark Kent, in his signature ill-fitting suit, stood holding a notebook and pen, staring at him with barely-concealed glee. Bruce cringed internally. He hated this. He especially hated when it had to be witnessed by someone he actually respected. or: After a Gala, Bruce and Clark end up in bed together. They're friends, just helping each other out, no strings attached. Which would be great, if Bruce hadn't been halfway to head-over-heels since the day they met.

entry.title: Once Upon a Time
entry.summary:
Author: WrenA

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,756Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 46

Summary: Once upon a time there was a prince. A lot of stories start with a prince or a princess. Or both. Or none. But they always tell of love. Bruce Wayne got shot. Very publicly so. entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,051Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 259

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,343Chapters: 20/20Kudos: 355

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.title: The Ruins Of Noblesse
entry.summary:
Author: NyxieSpades27

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,868Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Millions of years ago, the chaos and destruction of Earth was sealed by deities and mortals alike in a place far away from civilization. As trees were cut down, the population grew, and cities started taking over, one building in specific was built right above such seal. Having been broken, the heroes of Earth are determined to put it back in place and avoid the chaos to consume their homes. However, they can't do it alone. It is up to their sidekicks, legacies, and younger counterparts to protect their world... ...from Noblesse Academy.

entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

entry.title: Being part of the Kent-Wayne family isn’t so bad
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,607Chapters: 7/39Kudos: 110

Summary: It’s been three years since Dick and Kori got married, and many things have changed for the Kent-Wayne family. The family grew larger through more adoptions and also biological ties. New soulmates were discovered, more weddings were held, the Justice League can finally put a name to the man behind the cowl, and Wayne Manor will never look the same again. But the greatest change? Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent are officially engaged. This is the story of how they got there. As for Conner? He couldn’t be doing any better!
